market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: £3k Night Private Home Near City Centre
analysis.rewritten_desc: This exclusive 3-bedroom modern residential property offers complete privacy for 4 guests in a premium location. Features include spacious living areas, contemporary kitchen, and private bathrooms. Perfect for business travelers or those seeking luxury accommodation. The entire home is available for your stay, ensuring maximum comfort and flexibility. Note: This property is competitively priced for its location and amenities.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The master bedroom should be the first photo as it shows the main sleeping area and conveys space and quality
key_diagnosis: £3000 rate is +1840% above £154.60 cohort median while occupancy at 21.7% is 52% below 47.8% market average
Description completely missing which removes any narrative to justify premium pricing
Title lacks location and unique value propositions that would attract buyers at this price point
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £3000 rate is over 18x local average yet occupancy remains 48% below market benchmarks
